creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to aryeh.friedman from comment #3)
> Yes the message is very possible because it is what I get and I have all the
> patches you suggested and the full libressl 2.9.1 built from source:

Well no, you seem to be missing files/patch-vendor_openssl-sys_build_main.rs
for some reason.
